title: SPAIN enforcement action against Dental Clinic (1,200)
summary: Non-compliance with general data processing principles The Spanish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 1,200 on a dental clinic. The controller used video surveillance in its clinic for security purposes, including a camera in the doctor's office where patients were treated. This resulted in excessive data processing.
